name: Select Quiz
short_description: Select Quiz is the most fun and original quiz game! The game contains more than 3,500 questions, in 8 categories and 18 different characters to choose from.
detailed_description:
Select one of the 18 available characters to play with. Pick carefully! Each character has different knowledge and might help you if you don’t know the answer to a question. For example if you select the Chemist he can help you with a Science Question.
The game includes 3.500 questions in 8 different categories:
- Arts
- Celebrities
- Cinema/TV
- General Knowledge
- Geography
- History
- Science
- Sports

The game is called Select Quiz because the player can exclude a category or select to play with a single category of questions.
